title: Assemble squad and plan
goal: Turn an objective into a staffed plan, name missing role coverage, and stop before execution.

steps.text: Load the objective, artifacts, constraints, and known persona candidates.
Define the scope boundary, checkpoint definition of done, and validation evidence.
List the roles needed to shape, review, execute, and approve the work, then classify each as covered, covered-with-gaps, or missing.
Run reverse-interview analysis for uncertain or missing roles and recommend the smallest artifact set to close the top gaps.
Draft the squad roster, checkpoint plan, named next session, workstream routing when applicable, and delegated handoff packets.
Write the report with `squad-planning-report-template` and append the JSONL entry with `squad-planning-log-contract`.
Pause for AJ review before structural pack updates or execution handoff.
Apply only approved follow-up updates and revalidate affected PersonaKit artifacts and planning logs.

acceptanceCriteria: Scope, constraints, and current artifacts are explicit
Definition of done and validation expectations are explicit for the checkpoint
Required roles are listed with ownership and coverage classification
Uncertain or missing roles trigger reverse-interview analysis or an explicit stop before execution handoff
Execution-critical coverage gaps route to a named remediation or hiring session before execution
Delegated roles include compact handoff packets with grounding path, write scope, validation expectations, and fail-closed behavior
The report and JSONL entry agree on next session, validation owner, and delegated handoffs
No structural updates or execution handoff occur without AJ review

verification.text: Confirm the plan includes role coverage, missing artifacts, the first checkpoint, and next actions
Confirm reverse-interview output is present for uncertain or missing role coverage and that the report and JSONL entry agree on next session, validation owner, and delegated handoffs
If reverse-interview or hiring-remediation work was part of the pass, run `Scripts/check-persona-hiring-logs.sh`.
